### 2026-03-06 тАФ Manager UI: JSON Editor, Version Picker & Config Editor Layout

**Repo:** EDDI-Manager  
**Branch:** `feature/version-6.0.0`  
**Phase:** 3 тАФ Item #14

**What changed:**

1. **Monaco JSON Editor** (`json-editor.tsx`) тАФ Monaco-based editor wrapper with EDDI dark/light theme auto-detection via `useTheme()`, auto-format on mount, configurable read-only mode, loading spinner
2. **Version Picker** (`version-picker.tsx`) тАФ Dropdown showing version numbers with relative timestamps ("3h ago"). Renders as badge when only one version exists, select when multiple
3. **Config Editor Layout** (`config-editor-layout.tsx`) тАФ Shared editor chrome with `[ Form | JSON ]` tab toggle. both tabs share a single `useState` object for synchronized editing. Header shows type icon, resource name, version picker, save/discard buttons. Dirty-state detection via deep comparison. Form tab shows placeholder ("Visual editor coming soon") for Phase 3.17тАУ3.18
4. **`useUpdateResource` hook** тАФ Mutation calling `PUT /{store}/{plural}/{id}?version={version}`, invalidates queries on success
5. **Resource Detail page** тАФ Rewrote from `<pre>` JSON dump to full `ConfigEditorLayout` with save/discard/dirty-state. All hooks moved above early returns for Rules of Hooks compliance
6. **i18n** тАФ 15 new keys under `editor.*` in all 11 locale files (formTab, jsonTab, save, discard, dirty, etc.)
7. **Tests** тАФ 16 new tests: VersionPicker (3), ConfigEditorLayout (7), ResourceDetailPage integration (4), updated resources.test.tsx (2)
8. **Dependency** тАФ `@monaco-editor/react` installed (brings in `monaco-editor` as peer)

**Key decisions:**

- **Monaco mocked in tests** тАФ JSDOM can't render the Monaco canvas, so tests use a `<textarea>` mock via `vi.mock("@monaco-editor/react")`
- **FormтЖФJSON toggle architecture** тАФ `config-editor-layout.tsx` is the foundation for all Phases 3.15тАУ3.18 editors. Extension-specific form editors will be passed as `children` prop
- **JSON tab default** тАФ Since no form editors exist yet, JSON tab is the default active tab

**Tests:** тЬЕ 90/90 passing (12 files), TypeScript zero errors, build succeeds

#### Phase 3.14b тАФ Version Cascade & Deferred Items

9. **Location header fix** (`api-client.ts`) тАФ Capture Location header on `200 OK` responses (not just `201`), enabling version tracking for PUT updates
10. **Cascade save** (`cascade-save.ts`) тАФ Saves config, then walks packageтЖТagent chain updating version URIs. Parses new versions from Location headers
11. **Resource usage scanner** (`resource-usage.ts`) тАФ Finds all packages/agents referencing a given config, enabling the "update in agents" post-save dialog
12. **Update usage dialog** (`update-usage-dialog.tsx`) тАФ Amber-themed post-save dialog showing affected agents/packages with checkboxes for selective cascade
13. **Version picker data** (`getResourceVersions`) тАФ API function calling descriptors with `includePreviousVersions=true`
14. **Hooks** тАФ `useResourceVersions` (version picker), `useCascadeSave` (cascade mutation)
15. **Dual-path cascade** in `resource-detail.tsx`:
    - **Path A** (from agent/package): auto-cascade via `?pkgId=тАж&pkgVer=тАж&agentId=тАж&agentVer=тАж` query params
    - **Path B** (from resource view): post-save usage dialog showing affected agents
16. **MSW handlers** тАФ PUT returns Location header with incremented version; GET descriptors supports `includePreviousVersions` + `filter` params
17. **i18n** тАФ 7 new cascade keys in all 11 locales

**Return types updated:** `updateResource`, `updateWorkflow`, `updateAgent` now return `{ location: string }` to capture backend version URIs.

### 2026-03-06 тАФ Manager UI: EDDI Branding, Theme & Font

**Repo:** EDDI-Manager

3. **Original E.D.D.I logo** тАФ copied `logo_eddi.png` from EDDI backend repo to `public/`; sidebar shows image when expanded, compact gold "E." badge SVG when collapsed
4. **System theme fix** тАФ theme provider now has `matchMedia("prefers-color-scheme: dark")` change listener so "system" mode tracks OS preference in real time (was only checking once on mount)
5. **Wide-screen constraint** тАФ main content area capped at `max-w-screen-2xl` (1536px) to prevent infinite stretching on ultrawide monitors
6. **Test setup** тАФ added `window.matchMedia` mock to `setup.ts` for JSDOM compatibility

**Key decisions:**

- **Noto Sans over Inter** тАФ single font family covers all 11 supported languages' scripts without missing glyphs
- **SVG brand mark for collapsed sidebar** тАФ gold rounded square with "E." matches the logo's style at 28├Ч28px

5. **`top-bar.tsx`** тАФ language selector expanded from 3 to 11 options
6. **`config.test.ts`** тАФ added key parity regression tests: recursively compares every locale against `en.json` to prevent future key drift (10 new tests)

**Key decisions:**

- **11 languages chosen for global coverage** тАФ en, de, fr, es, ar (RTL), zh, th, ja, ko, pt, hi (~4.5 billion native speakers)
- **Key parity test as regression guard** тАФ any new key added to en.json will cause tests to fail until all 10 locales are updated
- **Hindi uses Devanagari script** тАФ no special rendering needed, standard Unicode

### 2026-03-06 тАФ Manager UI: Import/Export + Agent Wizard

**Repo:** EDDI-Manager  
**Branch:** `feature/version-6.0.0`  
**Phase:** 3 тАФ Item #11

**What changed:**

1. **Backup API module** (`backup.ts`) тАФ typed functions for `exportAgent` (2-step: POST to create zip, GET to download), `downloadAgentZip` (triggers browser file save via `<a download>`), `importAgent` (POST with `application/zip` body)
2. **TanStack Query hooks** (`use-backup.ts`) тАФ `useExportAgent` (chained export + download), `useImportAgent` (upload zip, invalidates agents cache)
3. **Agents page** тАФ "Import Agent" button with hidden file input (.zip), "Agent Wizard" CTA link alongside existing "Create Agent"
4. **Agent card** тАФ "Export" added to context menu dropdown (between Duplicate and Delete)
5. **Agent detail page** тАФ "Export" button in header actions area
6. **Agent Wizard page** (`agent-wizard.tsx`) тАФ 4-step guided creation: Template (3 presets: Blank, Q&A, Weather), Info (name/description), Workflows (default package toggle), Review & Create/Deploy
7. **Step progress indicator** тАФ animated circles with checkmarks for completed steps, connecting lines
8. **Routing** тАФ `/manage/agents/wizard` тЖТ AgentWizardPage (placed before `/manage/agentview/:id` for correct matching)
9. **i18n** тАФ 40+ new keys under `agents.*` (export/import) and `wizard.*` (all step labels, template names/descriptions)
10. **MSW handlers** тАФ 3 new handlers for `POST /backup/export/:agentId`, `GET /backup/export/:filename`, `POST /backup/import`
11. **Tests** тАФ 11 new tests: 4 for import/export UI (backup.test.tsx), 7 for wizard flow (agent-wizard.test.tsx)

**Key decisions:**

- **Export is a 2-step flow** тАФ POST triggers backend zip creation, response Location header contains the download URL, second GET fetches the binary
- **Import uses raw fetch** тАФ `Content-Type: application/zip` requires bypassing the JSON api-client
- **Wizard is page-internal state** тАФ no separate routes per step, single component with step counter, keeps back/forward simple
- **Templates are cosmetic placeholders** тАФ all currently create blank agents; future phases can wire template-specific package presets

**Tests:** тЬЕ 64/64 passing (11 files), TypeScript zero errors, build succeeds

### 2026-03-06 тАФ Manager UI: Resources Pages (Generic CRUD)

**Repo:** EDDI-Manager  
**Branch:** `feature/version-6.0.0`  
**Phase:** 3 тАФ Item #10

**What changed:**

1. **Generic API layer** (`resources.ts`) тАФ single parameterized CRUD module that drives all 6 resource types: Behavior Rules (`/behaviorstore/behaviorsets`), HTTP Calls (`/httpcallsstore/httpcalls`), Output Sets (`/outputstore/outputsets`), Dictionaries (`/regulardictionarystore/regulardictionaries`), LangChain (`/langchainstore/langchains`), Property Setter (`/propertysetterstore/propertysetters`)
2. **TanStack Query hooks** (`use-resources.ts`) тАФ `useResourceDescriptors`, `useResource`, `useCreateResource`, `useDeleteResource`, `useDuplicateResource` тАФ all parameterized by type slug, with graceful handling of unknown types (disabled queries instead of throwing)
3. **Resource Card** (`resource-card.tsx`) тАФ reusable card with dynamic icon mapping, context menu (duplicate/delete)
4. **Create Resource Dialog** (`create-resource-dialog.tsx`) тАФ creates empty config, navigates to detail page
5. **Hub Page** (`resources.tsx`) тАФ 6 category cards with icons, descriptions, and item counts
6. **List Page** (`resource-list.tsx`) тАФ generic: search, card grid, create button, error/empty states
7. **Detail Page** (`resource-detail.tsx`) тАФ raw JSON viewer, duplicate/delete actions
8. **Routing** тАФ `/manage/resources/:type` тЖТ ResourceListPage, `/manage/resources/:type/:id` тЖТ ResourceDetailPage
9. **i18n** тАФ 20+ new keys under `resources.*` including all 6 type names and descriptions
10. **MSW handlers** тАФ `createResourceHandlers()` helper generates mock endpoints for all 6 types
11. **Tests** тАФ 15 new tests for hub, list, and detail pages

**Key decisions:**

- **One solution, six types** тАФ all 6 resource types share identical backend API shape, so a single `ResourceTypeConfig` object drives the entire stack (API тЖТ hooks тЖТ pages)
- **Hooks handle unknown types gracefully** тАФ queries are disabled (not thrown) for invalid slugs, allowing pages to render error UI

**Tests:** тЬЕ 53/53 passing (9 files), TypeScript zero errors, build succeeds

## Historical: Early v6 Planning Decisions (March 2026)

> Consolidated from `docs/v6-planning/changelog.md` during docs cleanup (2026-04-14).

### Planning Phase (2026-03-05)

**Key decisions:**

| # | Decision | Reasoning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | UI framework: **React + Vite + shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS** | AI-friendly (components are plain files), no dependency rot, accessible (Radix), fast DX |
| 2 | Keep Chat UI **standalone** + extract **shared component** | EDDI has a dedicated single-agent chat endpoint; standalone deployment is needed |
| 3 | Website: **Astro** on GitHub Pages | Static output, built-in i18n routing, zero JS by default, Tailwind integration |
| 4 | **Skip API versioning** | Only clients are Manager + Chat UI, both first-party controlled |
| 5 | **Remove internal snapshot tests** | Never production-ready; integration tests provide sufficient coverage |
| 6 | **Trunk-based branching** | Short-lived feature branches, squash merge, clean main history |
| 7 | **Mobile-first responsive** is Phase 1 | Core requirement, not afterthought; Tailwind breakpoints make this natural |

**Biggest gap discovered:** No CI/CD anywhere тАФ all builds, tests, and deployments were manual.

### Phase 6E Decision (2026-03-15) тАФ quarkus-langchain4j тЖТ langchain4j Core

Dropped `quarkus-langchain4j` entirely, using core `langchain4j` only. 4 of 7 model builders already used core `dev.langchain4j`; quarkiverse CDI features (`@RegisterAiService`, Dev Services) were architecturally incompatible with EDDI's runtime JSON-config-driven model building.

### Phase 6C (2026-03-15) тАФ Infinispan тЖТ Caffeine

Replaced Infinispan `EmbeddedCacheManager` with Caffeine (provided transitively by `quarkus-cache`). Removed 4 Infinispan dependencies. Key finding: Infinispan was NOT used for cross-instance coordination тАФ agent deployment uses DB-backed polling.

### Lombok Removal Analysis (2026-03-15)

114 files, 371 annotation usages. Lombok uses `sun.misc.Unsafe::objectFieldOffset` тАФ terminally deprecated in Java 25. Replaced with IntelliJ Delombok + records + JBoss Logger.

### Roadmap Restructuring (2026-03-15)

Restructured from 8 phases to 14 phases. Created `docs/project-philosophy.md` (7 architectural pillars). Key decisions: Secrets Vault + Audit Ledger promoted to Phase 7 (EU AI Act), MCP split into server/client phases, RAG pulled forward as quick win.

| ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03-05 | Use Astro (not Expo) for website                                      | Static site on GitHub Pages           | Expo would add unnecessary abstraction for a marketing site |
| 2026-03-05 | Use AI complexity scale (ЁЯЯв/ЁЯЯб/ЁЯФ┤/тЪл) instead of human time estimates | AI will do all implementation work    | Human hours are meaningless for AI execution                |
| 2026-03-05 | Docs already published at docs.labs.ai                                | Third-party tool reads `docs/` folder | Could migrate to Astro Content Collections later            |
